title: SCBE Chemistry 0.5B QLoRA v7 Raw Anchor Repair
description: Follow-up to v6. v6 scaffolded gate passed 5/5 but raw model passed 0/5, proving the wrapper worked but exact raw anchor preservation did not. v7 adds chemistry_raw_anchor_repair_v1 analog rows targeting the observed raw corruptions: carboxyllic acid -> carboxylic acid, NA_clathrine -> NaCl, queue_drill_guard -> queue_drain_guard, and missing oxygen/alcohol/SCBE fusion/not a molecule anchors. Push remains disabled. Production-shim gate is enabled for deployability diagnostics, while raw_pass_rate is the metric that decides whether the repair worked.
system_prompt: You are an SCBE-AETHERMOORE chemistry verification agent. Answer in concise English. Preserve exact chemistry anchors and code-token boundary anchors without paraphrase. If a near-miss spelling appears, repair it explicitly. Use PASS only for valid chemistry routes and DENY for invalid material chemistry claims.

evaluation.secondary_gate: raw_pass_rate must improve over v6 baseline 0/5 = 0.0 before claiming raw-anchor repair worked
evaluation.do_not_claim: do not claim raw chemistry competence unless raw_pass_rate clears at least 2/5 on the unchanged frozen gate

notes: v7 changes data, not just step count. v6 already showed more steps alone did not internalize exact markers.
The new raw-anchor shard is generated by scripts/training_data/build_chemistry_raw_anchor_repair_sft.py and documented in docs/ops/TRAINING_RUN_REVIEW_CHEMISTRY_V6_2026-05-07.md.
Production-shim gate remains enabled so deployability can be measured, but raw_pass_rate is the repair target.
push_adapter remains false. Publish manually only if production-shim gate clears and raw_pass_rate improves over the v6 floor.
This profile is ready for a free/controlled remote GPU lane; this local machine has no CUDA device.
